recommendations.title: Forever My Girl
recommendations.overview: After being gone for a decade, a country star returns home to the love he left behind.

recommendations.title: Love Tactics 2
recommendations.overview: Asli thinks marriage is a scam, and says so. But when her beau Kerem unexpectedly agrees, she goes to great lengths to manipulate him into proposing.

recommendations.title: The Last Five Years
recommendations.overview: In New York, a struggling actress and a successful writer sing about their failed marriage from two perspectives.

recommendations.title: Kapoor & Sons
recommendations.overview: Returning home to visit their ill grandfather, two estranged brothers must confront their unresolved rivalry while their parents’ marriage frays.

recommendations.title: Guess Who
recommendations.overview: When a young African-American woman brings her fiancé home to meet her parents, she's neglected to mention one tiny detail – he's white.

recommendations.title: Love Tactics
recommendations.overview: An ad executive and a fashion designer-blogger don't believe in love, so they place a bet to make the other fall head over heels - with unusual tactics.

recommendations.title: Miller's Girl
recommendations.overview: A talented young writer embarks on a creative odyssey when her teacher assigns a project that entangles them both.

recommendations.title: Love per Square Foot
recommendations.overview: Individually, bank employees Sanjay and Karina don't earn enough to be able to buy a home, so they decide to enter into a marriage of convenience.

recommendations.title: Battle for Sevastopol
recommendations.overview: The story of Lyudmila Pavlichenko, the most successful female sniper in history.

recommendations.title: Maine Pyar Kiya
recommendations.overview: After Suman's father leaves her in the care of another family while he travels abroad, she falls in love with Prem. However, in order to for them to marry, Prem has to prove to Suman's father that he is not the same as his own dad.
